message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Actor
participant "Dashboard" as Dashboard
participant "DashboardController" as DashboardController
participant "IssuesDetailController" as IssuesDetailController
participant "IssuesService" as IssuesService
participant "IssuesEntityService" as IssuesEntityService
participant "EntityService" as EntityService
participant "IssuesRepository" as IssuesRepository
participant "IssueRepository" as IssueRepository

DashboardController -> DashboardController : createlIssues()
activate DashboardController
DashboardController --> DashboardController : new / redirect
deactivate DashboardController

par
DashboardController -> IssuesDetailController : getIssues()
activate IssuesDetailController
IssuesDetailController -> IssuesService : createlIssuesStatistics()
activate IssuesService
IssuesService -> IssuesEntityService : findAll()
activate IssuesEntityService
IssuesEntityService -> EntityService : selectAllIssues()
activate EntityService
EntityService -> IssueRepository : findAll()
activate IssueRepository
loop
  EntityService -> IssueRepository : new
  activate IssueRepository
  IssueRepository --> EntityService : Issues
  deactivate IssueRepository
end
loop
  EntityService -> IssueRepository : findById(id)
  activate IssueRepository
  IssueRepository --> EntityService : Issue
  deactivate IssueRepository
end
EntityService --> IssuesEntityService : Set<Issues>
deactivate EntityService
IssuesEntityService --> IssuesService : Set<Issues>
deactivate IssuesEntityService
IssuesService --> IssuesDetailController : IssuesStatistics
deactivate IssuesService
IssuesDetailController --> DashboardController : IssuesStatistics
deactivate IssuesDetailController

DashboardController -> DashboardController : select report
activate DashboardController
DashboardController --> DashboardController : details
deactivate DashboardController
DashboardController --> DashboardController : new / redirect
deactivate DashboardController

par
DashboardController -> IssuesDetailController : getCategories(origin, reference)
activate IssuesDetailController
IssuesDetailController -> IssuesEntityService : createDistributionByCategory(origin, reference)
activate IssuesEntityService
IssuesEntityService -> EntityService : findByPrimaryKey(origin, reference)
activate EntityService
EntityService -> IssueRepository : select(origin, reference)
activate IssueRepository
IssueRepository -> IssueRepository : findById(origin, reference)
activate IssueRepository
loop
  IssueRepository -> IssueRepository : new
  activate IssueRepository
  IssueRepository --> IssueRepository : Issues
  deactivate IssueRepository
end
IssueRepository --> EntityService : Issues
deactivate IssueRepository
EntityService --> IssuesEntityService : Issues
deactivate EntityService
IssuesEntityService --> IssuesDetailController : IssuePropertyDistribution
deactivate IssuesEntityService
IssuesDetailController --> DashboardController : IssuePropertyDistribution
deactivate IssuesDetailController
@enduml
